base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ridleys_lair_zone_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 metroid. Ridley's Lair — purple alien-metal zone. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Ridley's Lair — purple alien-metal zone; Ridley boss fight; entered via separate elevator from Norfair
